brandTone: Write like a fashion concept-store editor, not a discount ad.
contentStructures: Cover: short headline plus compact category.
Story: one clear idea per slide.
Closing: summarize why the product or brand matters.
goodExamples: A restrained silhouette shaped by utility and quiet tension.
The piece feels familiar at first, then reveals its construction through detail.
badExamples: This amazing product is perfect for everyone.
You absolutely need this item right now.
imageRules: Do not describe image details unless the user provided them.
Use image filename or focus only as light context.
ctaRules: Prefer discovery-oriented language over direct sales language.
hashtagRules: Use brand and category hashtags only when relevant.
